title: conyza agnewii
intro: Conyza agnewii, also known as Agnew's fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Conyza agnewii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Conyza agnewii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
